prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、人工智能、统计学类等专业社会热度高热/推荐，就业前景广阔；安徽省2026年普通高考考生总数约45. 1万人，较2025年分科合计46.2万人略有减少。；中国人民大学位于北京市，属于跨省招生。物理类2026年计划22人，较202 1–2022年的35人有所缩减，招生规模呈下降趋势，对竞争有一定加剧作用。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Renmin University of China in Anhui Province's Physics Category (including former Science Category) were: approximately 879 in 2021, 834 in 2022, 1398 in 2023, 1704 in 2024, and 837 in 2025. The ranking fluctuated between 834 and 1704 over the past five years, with a significant rebound from 1704 in 2024 to 837 in 2025, indicating intensified competition. The enrollment plan for Physics Category in Anhui: 35 in 2021, 35 in 2022, 33 in 2023, 31 in 2024, 22 in 2025, and 22 in 2026. The 2026 plan remains unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Renmin University of China is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university, ranking 17th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, firmly among the top universities in China. Although renowned for humanities and social sciences, its strengths in science and engineering, such as Statistics (A+) and Computer Science and Technology (A), are equally outstanding. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, Renmin University's reputation is rated as slightly negative, mainly due to public opinion related to teacher ethics. Its Douyin school popularity ranks 44th, rated as relatively hot. The slightly negative reputation may mildly suppress application enthusiasm. In the fifth round of discipline evaluations, Renmin University achieved A+ in Statistics, A in Computer Science and Technology, and A- in Physics, demonstrating strong capabilities in science and engineering. Majors like Statistics, Computer Science, and Artificial Intelligence, supported by A+ and A-level disciplines, are highly attractive to top-scoring science students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, and Statistics are highly popular/recommended in society, with broad employment prospects. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Anhui Province general college entrance examination is approximately 451,000, slightly down from 462,000 in 2025 (combined subjects). Renmin University is located in Beijing, involving cross-province enrollment. The 2026 Physics Category plan of 22 students is reduced from 35 in 2021-2022, showing a declining enrollment scale, which intensifies competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant fluctuations in historical rankings (834-1704), the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan compared to 2025 (22 students), the sharp rebound in 2025 ranking to 837 (a high point in recent years), and the slightly negative reputation, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be approximately 852, a slight drop of 15 places from 2025. The prediction range is 755-949.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Computer Science (Turing Computer Top Talent Class)
- Artificial Intelligence (Top Talent Class)
- Statistics (Digital Intelligence Scientist Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Computer Science (AI Full-Stack Engineer Program)
- Mathematics (Intelligent Mathematics and Data Computing Excellence Program)
- Science Experimental Class (New Era Economics Top Talent Class)
- Science Experimental Class (Finance and Big Data Technology Innovation Talent Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Science Experimental Class (Big Data Analysis and Business Intelligence)
- Science Experimental Class (Finance and Mathematics Innovation Talent Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 755-949, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. For rankings significantly better than 755 (e.g., within 700), prioritize Tier 1 majors like Computer Science Turing Class and Artificial Intelligence Top Talent Class. For rankings near 949, focus on Tier 3 majors to ensure admission. Renmin University's Physics Category has a limited enrollment of 22 in 2026, leading to intense competition, so it is advisable to reasonably balance the gradient of stretch, stable, and safety choices.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Renmin University of China in Anhui Province's History Category (including original Liberal Arts) were: approximately 114th in 2021, 123rd in 2022, 176th in 2023, 125th in 2024, and 139th in 2025. The ranking fluctuation range over the past five years is 114–176, with a baseline ranking of about 139th in 2025, slightly lower than 2024, showing a narrow oscillation pattern. The enrollment plan for the History Category in Anhui Province: 35 in 2021, 35 in 2022, 31 in 2023, 25 in 2024, 43 in 2025, and 45 planned for 2026. Compared to 2025, 2026 sees an increase of 2 students, a growth of about 4.7%, which somewhat alleviates competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Renmin University of China is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it ranks 17th (17th in 2025, 18th in 2024), firmly among the top universities in the country and one of the highest institutions in the humanities and social sciences. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, Renmin University of China's reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving incidents related to teacher ethics and style. On Douyin, the school's popularity ranks 44th, evaluated as relatively hot, with a comprehensive popularity of about 966,000, maintaining a certain level of attention on short video platforms. The overall slightly negative reputation may have a mild inhibitory effect on application enthusiasm. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Renmin University of China has 9 A+ disciplines (Law, Applied Economics, Theoretical Economics, Sociology, Chinese Language and Literature, Journalism and Communication, Marxist Theory, Business Administration, Statistics), 4 A disciplines (Chinese History, Philosophy, Foreign Languages and Literature, Political Science, Computer Science and Technology), and 1 A- discipline (Physics), with a total of 15 disciplines at A- or above, demonstrating extremely strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law, Finance, Economics, and other flagship majors of Renmin University of China have high social popularity. The popularity index for Law in 2026 is about 60–70, classified as recommended/relatively hot. Journalism and Communication majors have significantly cooled due to industry environment influences. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Anhui Province is about 451,000, slightly decreasing from 462,000 in 2025 (combined by subject categories), so competition pressure remains roughly the same. Renmin University of China is located in Beijing, involving cross-province enrollment, with no local enrollment preference in Anhui Province. The proportion of its History Category enrollment plan in Anhui relative to its national liberal arts plan is moderate, with no significant regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the narrow fluctuation of historical rankings (114–176), the 2026 enrollment expansion of 2 students (+4.7%), the slightly negative reputation, and the basically unchanged total number of candidates, based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 139, the expansion effect slightly alleviates competition but the slightly negative reputation offsets it. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for the History Category in 2026 will be about 148th, slightly lower by 9 places compared to 2025. The predicted range is 131–165.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 131–165, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If the ranking is significantly better than 131 (e.g., within 120), focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors like Law and Finance. If the ranking is close to 165, it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors to ensure admission. Renmin University of China has a sufficient enrollment plan in Anhui Province's History Category (45 in 2026), providing ample room for major selection.
